Language: typescript
open-source coding agent

ns0:entry.ns0:title: diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/diegosouzapw/OmniRoute
Language: typescript
Never stop coding. Free AI gateway: one endpoint, 160+ providers (50+ free), connect Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Cline & Copilot to FREE Claude/GPT/Gemini. RTK+Caveman stacked compression saves 15-95% tokens, smart auto-fallback, MCP/A2A, multimodal APIs, Desktop/PWA.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: earendil-works/pi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/earendil-works/pi
Language: typescript
AI agent toolkit: unified LLM API, agent loop, TUI, coding agent CLI

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fluxerapp/fluxer
Language: typescript
A free and open source instant messaging and VoIP chat app built for friends, groups, and communities.

URL: https://github.com/freeCodeCamp/freeCodeCamp

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/langfuse/langfuse
Language: typescript
🪢 Open source AI engineering platform: LLM evals, observability, metrics, prompt management, playground, datasets. Integrates with OpenTelemetry, LangChain, OpenAI SDK, LiteLLM, and more. 🍊YC W23

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/likec4/likec4
Language: typescript
Visualize, collaborate, and evolve the software architecture with always actual and live diagrams from your code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: makeplane/plane
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/makeplane/plane
Language: typescript
🔥🔥🔥 Open-source Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp alternative. Plane is a modern project management platform to manage tasks, sprints, docs, and triage.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: meshery/meshery
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/meshery/meshery
Language: typescript
Meshery, the cloud native manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nocobase/nocobase
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nocobase/nocobase
Language: typescript
NocoBase is an open-source AI + no-code platform for building business systems fast. Instead of generating everything from scratch, AI works on top of production-proven infrastructure and a WYSIWYG no-code interface, so you get both speed and reliability.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openobserve/openobserve
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openobserve/openobserve
Language: typescript
Open source observability platform for logs, metrics, traces, frontend monitoring, pipelines and LLM observability. A sophisticated, simple and highly performant alternative to Datadog, Splunk, and Elasticsearch with 140x lower storage costs and single binary deployment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pagefaultgames/pokerogue
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pagefaultgames/pokerogue
Language: typescript
A browser based Pokémon fangame heavily inspired by the roguelite genre.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: promptfoo/promptfoo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo
Language: typescript
Test your prompts, agents, and RAGs. Red teaming/pentesting/vulnerability scanning for AI. Compare performance of GPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek, and more. Simple declarative configs with command line and CI/CD integration. Used by OpenAI and Anthropic.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: rmyndharis/OpenWA
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/rmyndharis/OpenWA
Language: typescript

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/ruflo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo
Language: typescript
🌊 The leading agent meta-harness for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features adaptive memory, self-learning swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration
